results.title: White Salmon has been fighting for free mail for decades
results.description: The small Washington town exemplifies a broader problem across the West, where some pay for a service others get for free. The post White Salmon has been fighting for free mail for decades appeared first on High Country News .

results.description: CHRISTIAN COUNTY, Ill. — By James Myers’ estimate, it’s been at least 10 years since the four oil wells on his farmland were abandoned. That’s 10 years of farming around idle pump jacks and tabulating acres damaged by fluid leaks....
